title: Tensura: Mysticism
description: Tensura: Mysticism is an add-on for the Tensura: Reincarnated mod, featuring new races and skills.
body:
# Tensura: Mysticism _Tensura: Mysticism_ is an add-on for [Tensura: Reincarnated](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tensura-reincarnated) that introduces new features and content not currently included in the main mod. # FYI, THERE IS A WIKI. [https://trmysticism.wiki.gg/](https://trmysticism.wiki.gg/) *** ## Features ## **Languages Supported** * **English** * **Chinese** * **Russian** * **Turkish** * **Spanish** ## **Playable Races** * **Sculk Worm Race** * **Dragonoid Race** * **Direwolf Race** * **Insect Race** with SIX SUBSPECIES (Ant, Beetle, Centipede, Scorpion, Spider, Wasp) * **Lesser Spirit Race** * **Lesser Angel Race** * **Phantom Race** * **Wyrm Race** ## **Ultimate Skills** To acquire an _Ultimate Skill_, you must: 1. Master its corresponding _Unique Skill_. 2. Awaken as a _True Demon Lord_ or _True Hero_. 3. Pay the acquiring MP cost, which can be expensive. Below are the skills available. ### The available Ultimate Skills: * **Adephaga, Lord of Devouring** * **Amaterasu, Lord of Shimmering Flame** * **Ame-no-Uzume-no-Mikoto, Lord of Entertainment** * **Antaeus, Lord of Opposition** * **Antevorta, Lord of Predictions** * **Antithesis, Lord of Inversion** * **Apollo, Lord of Music** * **Asmodeus, Lord of Lust** * **Beelzebub, Lord of Gourmet** * **Belphegor, Lord of Sloth** * **Bushyasta, Lord of Stagnation** * **Dionysus, Lord of Crashing** * **Galileo, Lord of Observation** * **Hades, Lord of Death** * **Heracles, Lord of The Hunt** * **Ignis, Lord of Explosions** * **Invictus, Lord of Victory** * **Laverna, Lord of Vainglory** * **Mephisto, Lord of Fantasy** * **Oizys, Lord of Melancholy** * **Pernida, Lord of Compliance** * **Sandalphon, Lord of Judgment** * **Sariel, Lord of Hope** * **Satanael, Lord of Wrath** * **Sephirot, Lord of Life** * **Susano'o, Lord of Tyranny** * **Takemikazuchi, Lord of Combat** * **Tsukuyomi, Lord of Moon Shadow** * **Uriel, Lord of Vows** * **Viciel, Lord of Lurking** * **Xezbeth, Lord of Lies** ### **Unique Skills** * **Compulsor** (Custom Skill for Hyorinmaru.) * **Crasher** _(ZYKES.)_ * **Cultivator** (Custom Skill for HVN\_Bael.) * **Dreamer** (evolves into Sephirot, and then Mephisto.) * **Melancholy** (evolves from Thrower.) * **Hidden Ruler** (Custom Skill for VicTheVictini.) * **Inverse** (Custom Skill for PropelGuy.) * **Plunderer** (Inspired by Looter in Tensura lore.) * **Spiritualist** (Custom Skill for a close friend.) * **Stagnator** (Custom Skill for Sinful\_Acedia.) * **Vainglory (evolves from Plunderer.)** * **Victorious Harbinger** (Custom Skill for im\_velo.) * **Constant** (Custom Skill for Demonking0015.) * **Captivator** (Unique Skill based on Oshi no Ko.) * **Engineer** (Loosely based on TF2 and Risk of Rain 2.) * **Gardener** (You like plants?) * **Gatekeeper** (Fate skill.) * **Repeater** (Cool design that came to mind, so I guess it's my custom skill?) * **The Balance** (Custom Skill for Hyorinmaru.) ### **Extra Skills** * **Ice Manipulation** * **Ice Domination** * **Darkness Manipulation** * **Darkness Domination** * **Light Manipulation** * **Light Domination** * **Cryogenic Cessation** (Blaze Direwolf) * **Profaned Prominence** (Frostfang Direwolf) ### **Intrinsic Skills** * **Burrow** (_Sculk Worm_) * **Corruption** _(Sculk Worm)_ * **Hell Hall** _(Enflamed Aberration)_ * **Command Undead** _(Wight King)_ * **Exoskeleton** _(Insect)_ * **Corrosion Transform** _(Corrosion Soul Insect)_ * **Poison Transform** _(Poison Soul Insect)_ * **Paralysis Transform** _(Paralysis Soul Insect)_ * **Lightning Mode** _(Lightning Soul Insect)_ * **Spark** _(Fire Ant)_ *** ### Important Notes * You **do NOT** need to manually modify your config files. The mod should configure itself automatically. * If the new races do not appear in-game, try restarting Minecraft and reopening it before creating a new world. ***

Development Team

[[ADDON DEVELOPMENT TEAM]]

{MODELER TEAM - I send wacky ideas to these people and they question my sanity.}
@adham_sherif - Modeler (I pay this dude WAY TOO MUCH every month.)
@sir_le0 - Modeler
@swoosh6296 - Modeler
@acedamocles - Texturer/Modeler (I'm sorry LMAO)
{BUILD TEAM - The cool people who make all the structures you see in game!}
@torvern.the.original - Build Team Lead
@yuuto_enomoto - Build Team
@xxdarkchildxx - Build Team
@divinepuma - Build Team
{SOUND DESIGNERS - They make the cool sounds you hear when some of our skills are in play! Also, they make entity noises too!}
@anima_the_soulborne - Sound Designer (Mainly makes soundtracks. Made Ritual Scythe SFX.)
@aurinoth - Sound Designer (Voice Actor)
@romxnce - Sound Designer (Asmodeus/Sariel's Fortitude, Engineer SFX, Oizys' Crush)
----------------------------------------
[HONORARY/PAST TEAM MEMBERS - Thank you for being part of the team!]
@im_velo - Admin/My Assistant...
@crykico - Ex Texturer Lead (Created Crasher/Dionysus/Mephisto/Sephirot/Amaterasu...)
@macomed - Ex Build Team Lead (Mephisto's Fantasy World)
@draco__01 - Coder (The World, Time Stop)

*** Enjoy exploring the world of _Tensura: Mysticism_!
